title: Faithful Glowing Ores 64x Addon
description: Addon for Faithful 64x texture pack. Make Ores Glow for Optifine Users.
body:
Addon for Faithful 64x texture pack. Make Ores Glow, so it's easier to see when mining in the dark.\
Put it on top of the [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) texture pack so it works properly.\
![List of glowing ores.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/197ff9294cfc71c3e6dc5db1b65155dcca8361c7.png)

**REQUIRES:**\
Of course this texture pack only works on [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads).\
You can use this texture pack on Fabric but it requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to work.\
If you're not an Optifine user, I suggest you to download another version that I have created for non-Optifine users, namely [Faithful Fusion Glowing Ores 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x-fusion-glowing-ores-addon).
